mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales indicates improving household demand and near-term revenue expectations, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the signal is evaluated each month.
failure_condition: Reject if months with positive 3-month RSAFS growth do not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than months with negative 3-month RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 4.0% and is higher than three months earlier, tighter discount-rate conditions reduce equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.0% and is above its level 3 months earlier
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean return exceeds the unconditional mean return.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in unemployment and slowdown in payroll employment signals weakening labor income and recession risk, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months while PAYEMS 3-month growth decelerates versus the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction trigger does not predict lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than either UNRATE-only or PAYEMS-only signals in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production trend reflects improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month INDPRO growth is followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction-related earnings pressure, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% year over year or crosses below its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are not followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered months, or if the return spread is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices combined with a high federal funds rate signals restrictive real-time policy pressure and inflation uncertainty, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month growth accelerates while FEDFUNDS is above 3.0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS trigger has no lower 5-day forward return than either CPIAUCSL acceleration alone or high FEDFUNDS alone.

mechanism_narrative: A falling unemployment rate during an expansion signals stronger household income and lower default risk, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if falling UNRATE triggers are followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than rising UNRATE observations in a rolling out-of-sample comparison.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP is expanding but industrial production is contracting, the divergence signals a weakening goods cycle beneath headline growth, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest year-over-year growth is positive while INDPRO 3-month growth is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the GDPC1-positive and INDPRO-negative divergence does not underperform periods where both GDPC1 and INDPRO are expanding over 20 trading days.
